#!/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/bash

# Path to repo root
REPO_ROOT=~/GhosTune/backend/freediag

# Loop through directories listed in TargetDirectories.txt
while read -r dir; do
    echo "Patching $dir..."
    # Example: add __attribute__((unused)) to unused variables automatically
    find "$REPO_ROOT/$dir" -type f -name '*.c' -exec sed -i \
        's/static const struct dtc_table_entry dtc_list_ems2k\[\]/static const struct dtc_table_entry dtc_list_ems2k[] __attribute__((unused))/' {} \;
done < "$REPO_ROOT/TargetDirectories.txt"

echo "Patching done. Ready to rebuild."
